proposal.working_title: FirstMovers Labs Explained: How the AI Implementation Workspace Works
proposal.one_line_angle: Surging /Labs/ traffic (+7x in 28d) shows search demand for clarity on what FirstMovers Labs actually delivers - this post turns that curiosity into a guided walkthrough of the workspace, the implementation modules, and who it serves.
outline_bullets: What FirstMovers Labs is (and what it isn't): the AI implementation workspace versus the consulting engagement
Inside the workspace: the four implementation modules (foundation, agents, workflows, measurement) and how teams progress through them
Who Labs is built for, and the signals that say you're ready for the workspace versus done-for-you consulting
